name: confluence
description: Reads Confluence Cloud spaces, pages, blog posts, labels, attachments, comments, tasks, and custom content, and writes pages, blog posts, and comments through the Confluence Cloud REST API v2.

risk.read: external Confluence Cloud API read of space/content metadata
risk.write: external mutation: creates/updates Confluence pages, blog posts, and comments; no destructive (delete) actions are exposed
risk.approval: required for all write actions; read-only otherwise
